Spring Data MongoDB

Interface FluentMongoOperations

All Superinterfaces:
ExecutableAggregationOperation, ExecutableFindOperation, ExecutableInsertOperation, ExecutableMapReduceOperation, ExecutableRemoveOperation, ExecutableUpdateOperation
All Known Subinterfaces:
MongoOperations
All Known Implementing Classes:
MongoTemplate
public interface FluentMongoOperations extends ExecutableFindOperation, ExecutableInsertOperation, ExecutableUpdateOperation, ExecutableRemoveOperation, ExecutableAggregationOperation, ExecutableMapReduceOperation
Stripped down interface providing access to a fluent API that specifies a basic set of MongoDB operations.
Since:
2.0
Author:
Christoph Strobl
